query: TG-43 Ir-192 dose rate constant air kerma strength calculation

results.title: The Fricke dosimeter as an absorbed dose to water primary standard for Ir-192 brachytherapy.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 25988983. 2015/06/07 00:00. PURPOSE: Manufacturing of miniaturized high activity iridium-192 (192Ir) sources 
have been made a market preference in modern brachytherapy. Smaller dimensions 
of the sources are flexible for smaller diameter of the applicators, and it is 
also suitable for interstitial implants. Presently, cobalt-60 (60Co) sources 
have been commercialized as an alternative to 192Ir sources for high-dose-rate 
(HDR) brachytherapy, since 60Co source have an advantage of l
